title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear information about an online language course.
audio_script: Speaker: Thank you for joining this online meeting about our new evening language course. The course is for people who studied Spanish at school but have not used it for some time. Your teacher will be Laura [14]White[/14]. Laura lived in Madrid for five years and enjoys helping adults speak with more confidence. The course starts next Monday, and each online lesson begins at [15]eight o'clock[/15]. Please log in five minutes early, so we can solve any sound problems before the class starts. You will need a computer or tablet, and also a small [16]notebook[/16] for new words. We will send worksheets by email, so you do not have to buy a book. In the first lesson, the topic will be [17]ordering food[/17], because this is useful when travelling. Later lessons will include shopping, directions and hotel questions. The lessons are relaxed, and mistakes are a normal part of learning. If you miss a class, a recording will be available in the [18]student area[/18] of our website. The full course lasts six weeks and costs [19]forty[/19] pounds. Please pay online by Friday to keep your place, as the group is limited to twelve students. After payment, you will receive the meeting link by email. During each lesson, students will work in pairs for short speaking activities. You can keep your camera off if you prefer, but your microphone must work well. Before the course begins, we will send you a simple activity so Laura can understand your level.  A short practice email will also be sent after every lesson. Weekly.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the teacher will be Laura White.
The speaker says each online lesson begins at eight o'clock.
The speaker says students need a small notebook.
The speaker says the first lesson topic will be ordering food.
The speaker says recordings will be available in the student area.
The speaker says the course costs forty pounds.
